---
title: Tired Old Kitchen Gets A Facelift
author: Jeffrey S. Racine
date: 2024-11-30
draft: false
feed: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Spending your kids' inheritance on a kitchen renovation is taxing in
more ways than one. You have to deal with the mess, the noise, the dust,
the inconvenience, the cost, and the stress. But the journey was worth
it. The kitchen is the heart of the home, and it's where we spend most
of our time. We have one previous kitchen reno under our belts in our
home in Syracuse, a Home Depot design done in 2003. When we bought our
current home in Dundas, the previous owners had spruced up the kitchen
with maple door cabinets and engineered flooring layered on top of
plywood layered on top of the original wide plank pine flooring. The
kitchen was functional, but 20 years later it was tired, appliances were
failing, and the cabinets were showing their age. We decided to take the
plunge and do a full kitchen renovation.

# Pre Renovation Gallery

::: {layout-col="4"}
![](images/pre/kitchen_full_view.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/pantry.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/mudroom.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/mudroom_window.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/cabinet_laminate.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/floor_layer.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/microwave.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/pre/backsplash.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
:::

# Demolition and Structural Repairs

::: {layout-col="4"}
![](images/demo/full_view.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/pantry.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/mudroom.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/mudroom_window.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/habitat.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/beam.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/subfloor.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/demo/knob_tube.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
:::

# Construction & Floors

:::: {layout-col="4"}
![](images/during/kitchen_full_view.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/during/pantry.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/during/mudroom.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/during/floor.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}

# Cabinet Install

::: {layout-col="4"}
![](images/install/kitchen_full_view.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/install/pantry.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"} 
![](images/install/mudroom.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
![](images/install/windows.jpg){width="150" fig-align="center"}
:::
::::
